domain_description:
push域覆盖营销push业务，包含Push消息发送、曝光追踪、点击效果等核心场景。
业务范围：
- Push发送效果：发送量、到达量、曝光量、点击量等指标分析
- Push任务管理：任务创建、生效时间、状态流转等
- Push文案管理：人工文案、AIGC文案、创意标签等
- Push渠道区分：机型、环境、业务线等维度分析
---

global_rules.join_rule: 优先使用 ADS / DWS 汇总表；任务详情使用核心 DWD 宽表；曝光/点击明细按 delivery_push_task_id 关联任务表。
global_rules.dt_rule: 所有 push 域查询必须过滤 dt 分区；线上环境优先补充 environment = 'R'。

table_list.description: **push任务明细宽表（核心表）** - 汇总push任务、文案、业务线、行业组织、AIGC文案等所有信息
香港用户-ASAP-push消息-push发送-曝光-点击明细表-慢表
push曝光日志明细表（小时分区）
push点击日志明细表（小时分区）

tables.description: push任务核心宽表，汇总所有任务、文案、业务线、AIGC文案等所有信息

columns.name: dt
columns.description: 日期；格式: yyyyMMdd   示例：20260322

columns.name: push_type
columns.description: push类型；枚举：PUSH_MARKETING, PUSH_PLATFORM, PUSH_STRATEGY, PUSH_COMMERCIAL, PUSH_EVENT

columns.name: creative_type
columns.description: 文案类型；枚举：Manual, LLM   示例：LLM

columns.name: status
columns.description: 任务状态；枚举：INIT, RUNNING, PAUSE, FINISH   示例：RUNNING

columns.name: environment
columns.description: 环境；枚举：R, P   示例：R

columns.name: biz_line_name_lv1
columns.description: 一级业务线名称；示例：钱包

columns.name: biz_line_name_lv2
columns.description: 二级业务线名称；示例：运营

columns.name: biz_line_name_lv3
columns.description: 三级业务线名称；示例：营销

columns.name: industry_org_name
columns.description: 行业组织名称；示例：综测

columns.name: call_login
columns.description: 负责工号；文案负责人工号   示例：zhangsan

columns.name: aigc_text
columns.description: AIGC生成文案；大模型生成的push文案内容   示例：您的钱包余额不足...

examples:
SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    push_type,
    creative_type,
    biz_line_name_lv1,
    industry_org_name,
    gmt_create
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND status = 'RUNNING'
  AND environment = 'R'
  AND business_unit_code = 'SG_MAGA_HK';

SELECT 
    biz_line_name_lv1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) as task_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN creative_type = 'AIGC' THEN delivery_push_task_id END) as aigc_task_cnt
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
  AND business_unit_code = 'SG_MAGA_HK'
GROUP BY biz_line_name_lv1;

SELECT 
    creative_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) as task_cnt
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
  AND business_unit_code = 'SG_MAGA_HK'
GROUP BY creative_type;

SELECT 
    industry_org_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) as task_cnt
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY industry_org_name;

tables.description: push慢表，用于分析push消息的发送曝光及点击转化效果，聚焦慢查询场景

columns.name: delivery_push_task_name
columns.description: push任务名称；202604-生活頻道-本地優惠大牌餐飲券-Push

columns.name: industry_org_name
columns.description: 行业组织名称；数字生活_chill生活

columns.name: push_title
columns.description: push标题；��️享受美食前先買張券，即慳超多！即買��

columns.name: user_lifecycle
columns.description: 用户生命周期；新手期用户,成长期用户,成熟期用户,衰退期用户,流失期用户,沉默期用户

columns.name: user_value
columns.description: 用户价值；高价值用户,一般价值用户,重点发展用户,一般发展用户,重点保持用户,一般保持用户,重点挽留用户,低价值用户

columns.name: user_activity_level
columns.description: 用户活跃分层；高频,中频,低频,流失,沉默

columns.name: push_type
columns.description: push类型；营销Push，平台Push，战略Push，商业化Push,事件push

examples:
SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    count(1) as send_pv,
    COUNT(if(is_expo='1',1,null)) AS total_expo_pv,
    COUNT(if(is_clk='1',1,null)) AS total_clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS user_cnt
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_send_expo_clk_detail_slow_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id
ORDER BY total_expo DESC

SELECT  delivery_push_task_id
        ,COUNT(IF(is_expo = '1', 1, NULL)) AS total_expo_pv
        ,COUNT(IF(is_clk = '1', 1, NULL)) AS total_clk_pv
        ,ROUND(COUNT(IF(is_clk = '1', 1, NULL)) / NULLIF(COUNT(IF(is_expo = '1', 1, NULL)), 0), 4) AS ctr
FROM    anthk_sg.adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_send_expo_clk_detail_slow_di
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id

SELECT 
    user_lifecycle,
    user_value,
    user_activity_level,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS user_cnt,
    SUM(is_expo) AS expo_cnt,
    SUM(is_clk) AS clk_cnt,
    ROUND(SUM(is_clk) / NULLIF(SUM(is_expo), 0), 4) AS ctr
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_send_expo_clk_detail_slow_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY user_lifecycle, user_value, user_activity_level

SELECT 
    environment,
    push_channel_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) AS task_cnt,
    SUM(is_expo) AS expo_cnt,
    SUM(is_clk) AS clk_cnt,
    ROUND(SUM(is_clk) / NULLIF(SUM(is_expo), 0), 4) AS ctr
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_send_expo_clk_detail_slow_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY environment, push_channel_type

tables.description: push发送日志明细表，记录每个用户/设备的发送记录

columns.name: dt
columns.description: 日期；格式: yyyyMMdd   示例：20260322

columns.name: send_time
columns.description: 发送时间；格式：yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss  示例：2026-03-22 14:30:25

columns.name: send_status
columns.description: 发送状态；枚举：SEND_SUCCESS, SEND_FAIL   示例：SEND_SUCCESS

columns.name: push_sub_title
columns.description: 文案副标题；示例：券立即享$5优惠！

columns.name: environment
columns.description: 环境；枚举：R, P   示例：R

columns.name: send_count
columns.description: 发送次数；预存字段，直接 COUNT(calculated)

columns.name: send_success_count
columns.description: 发送成功次数；WHERE send_status = 'SEND_SUCCESS' COUNT

columns.name: send_fail_count
columns.description: 发送失败次数；WHERE send_status = 'SEND_FAIL' COUNT

examples:
SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    send_status,
    COUNT(*) as send_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as send_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_push_task_info_detail_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id, send_status;

SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    send_time,
    send_status,
    push_title,
    push_sub_title
FROM adm_hk_asap_push_task_info_detail_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND user_id = '${user_id}'
  AND environment = 'R'
ORDER BY send_time DESC;

SELECT 
    send_status,
    COUNT(*) as cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) as task_cnt
FROM adm_hk_asap_push_task_info_detail_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY send_status;

SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    COUNT(*) as total_send,
    SUM(CASE WHEN send_status = 'SEND_SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN send_status = 'SEND_SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as success_rate
FROM adm_hk_asap_push_task_info_detail_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND environment = 'R'
GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id;

tables.description: push域曝光日志明细表，用于分析push消息的曝光效果

columns.name: ip_country
columns.cn_name: 从ip中解析出来的国家名称
columns.description: 从ip中解析出来的国家名称；中国，USA

columns.name: ip_province
columns.cn_name: 从ip中解析出来的省份名称
columns.description: 从ip中解析出来的省份名称；浙江省，California

columns.name: ip_city
columns.cn_name: 从ip中解析出来的城市名称
columns.description: 从ip中解析出来的城市名称；杭州市，San Francisco

columns.name: log_type
columns.description: 日志来源渠道；native, h5, cashier

columns.name: push_title
columns.description: push的标题；�� 只差一步！完成認證即可享有更多福利

columns.name: push_sub_title
columns.description: push的文本；快啲嚟解鎖專屬禮遇！立即認證 >

examples:
SELECT 
    dt,
    COUNT(*) AS expo_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS expo_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_expo_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY dt

SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    COUNT(*) AS expo_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS expo_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_expo_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id

SELECT 
    push_channel,
    COUNT(*) AS expo_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS expo_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_expo_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY push_channel

tables.description: push域点击日志明细表，用于分析push消息的点击转化效果

columns.name: ip_country
columns.cn_name: 从ip中解析出来的国家名称
columns.description: 从ip中解析出来的国家名称；中国, USA

columns.name: ip_province
columns.cn_name: 从ip中解析出来的省份名称
columns.description: 从ip中解析出来的省份名称；浙江省, California

columns.name: ip_city
columns.cn_name: 从ip中解析出来的城市名称
columns.description: 从ip中解析出来的城市名称；杭州市, San Francisco

columns.name: log_type
columns.description: 日志来源渠道；native, h5, cashier

columns.name: push_title
columns.description: push的标题；�� 只差一步！完成認證即可享有更多福利

columns.name: push_sub_title
columns.description: push的文本；快啲嚟解鎖專屬禮遇！立即認證 >

examples:
SELECT 
    dt,
    COUNT(*) AS clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS clk_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_clk_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY dt

SELECT 
    delivery_push_task_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_clk,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS clk_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_clk_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id
ORDER BY total_clk DESC

SELECT 
    push_channel,
    COUNT(*) AS clk_pv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS clk_uv
FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_clk_di
WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
GROUP BY push_channel

SELECT 
    t.delivery_push_task_id,
    SUM(t.expo_pv) AS expo_pv,
    SUM(t.clk_pv) AS clk_pv,
    ROUND(SUM(t.clk_pv) / NULLIF(SUM(t.expo_pv), 0), 4) AS ctr
FROM (
    SELECT 
        delivery_push_task_id,
        0 AS expo_pv,
        COUNT(*) AS clk_pv
    FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_clk_di
    WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
    GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        delivery_push_task_id,
        COUNT(*) AS expo_pv,
        0 AS clk_pv
    FROM adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_log_expo_di
    WHERE dt = '${bizdate}'
    GROUP BY delivery_push_task_id
) t
GROUP BY t.delivery_push_task_id

concepts.description: push任务，控制投放时间、范围、内容等
concepts.related_table: **adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd** (核心DWD宽表，汇总所有任务、文案、业务线、行业组织、AIGC文案等所有信息)

concepts.description: push文案，包含标题、副标题、URL等
业务分类维度，用于组织投放资源

table_selection_rules.scenario: 查发送量/曝光量/点击量/CTR等聚合指标（任务维度）
查push任务详情/文案信息/任务状态/业务线
table_selection_rules.reason: 核心宽表，包含所有维度信息；业务线作为关键的组织维度，包含一级、二级、三级等多级结构

table_selection_rules.scenario: 需要用户级（单个用户）的发送/曝光/点击明细
AIGC任务分析（running状态/任务类型）
AIGC流量分析（累计指标/创意效果对比）
曝光/点击日志明细分析

metrics.name: 曝光量PV
metrics.description: push消息在设备上的展示次数

metrics.name: 发送量UV
metrics.description: 发送给不同用户的数量

metrics.name: 曝光量UV
metrics.description: 不同用户看到push消息的数量

metrics.name: 点击量UV
metrics.description: 不同用户点击push消息的数量

metrics.name: PV CTR
metrics.description: 点击PV / 曝光PV，保留4位小数

metrics.name: UV CTR
metrics.description: 点击UV / 曝光UV，保留4位小数

metrics.name: 运行中任务数
metrics.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN delivery_push_task_id END)

metrics.name: 按业务线统计
metrics.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN biz_line_code_lv1 = 'xxx' THEN delivery_push_task_id END)
metrics.description: 按一级业务线统计任务数

metrics.name: 用户级曝光计数
metrics.description: 某用户某任务的曝光次数

metrics.name: 用户级点击计数
metrics.description: 某用户某任务的点击次数

examples:
-- 按一级业务线统计任务数和运行中任务数
SELECT 
    dt
        ,biz_line_name_lv1
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) AS total_task_cnt
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'RUNNING' THEN delivery_push_task_id END) AS running_task_cnt
FROM    adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
AND     environment = 'R'
AND     business_unit_code = 'SG_MAGA_HK'
GROUP BY dt
        ,biz_line_name_lv1
ORDER BY total_task_cnt DESC;

-- 统计一级、二级、三级业务线下的任务分布
SELECT 
    dt,
        biz_line_name_lv1,
        biz_line_name_lv2,
        biz_line_name_lv3,
        COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id) AS task_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN creative_type = 'AIGC' THEN delivery_push_task_id END) AS aigc_task_cnt
FROM    adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
AND     environment = 'R'
AND     business_unit_code = 'SG_MAGA_HK'
GROUP BY dt
        ,biz_line_name_lv1
        ,biz_line_name_lv2
        ,biz_line_name_lv3
ORDER BY task_cnt DESC;

SELECT  dt
        ,biz_line_name_lv1
        ,SUM(send_cnt_pv)                  AS send_total_pv
        ,SUM(send_success_cnt_pv)           AS send_success_pv
        ,SUM(exposure_pv)                  AS exposure_total_pv
        ,SUM(click_pv)                     AS click_total_pv
        ,ROUND(SUM(click_pv) / NULLIF(SUM(exposure_pv), 0), 4) AS pv_ctr
        ,SUM(send_cnt_uv)                  AS send_total_uv
        ,SUM(exposure_uv)                  AS exposure_total_uv
        ,SUM(click_uv)                     AS click_total_uv
        ,ROUND(SUM(click_uv) / NULLIF(SUM(exposure_uv), 0), 4) AS uv_ctr
FROM    adm_hk_asap_push_task_info_fast_ds
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
  AND     environment = 'R'
GROUP BY dt
        ,biz_line_name_lv1
ORDER BY click_total_pv DESC;

-- 分析各业务线的AIGC任务占比、创新情况
SELECT 
    biz_line_name_lv1,
    COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_push_task_id)                     AS total_task_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN creative_type = 'AIGC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)        AS aigc_task_cnt,
    ROUND(aigc_task_cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_task_cnt, 0), 4) AS aigc_task_ratio
FROM    adm_hk_asap_dwd_push_task_info_dd
WHERE   dt = '${bizdate}'
AND     environment = 'R'
GROUP BY biz_line_name_lv1
ORDER BY total_task_cnt DESC;
